_comment: Canned probe queries per Azure AI Search index, used by drift.mjs to sample recall quality on a schedule. Queries are DELIBERATELY generic/topic-level (not real PHI/PII/MNPI content) so they are safe to keep in the repo and safe to log top-score/coverage results for. Add a new index by adding a key here with 3-8 representative queries; drift.mjs discovers indexes from this file's keys, so onboarding a new memory index (e.g. a new commons-<agent>-memory) is just adding a row.
